name: qa-claude
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin for every QA/QC engineer using AI: web/mobile automation, test-case generation, exploratory testing, review. Install once, use across projects; commands are namespaced as /qa:<command>. Automation and manual QA have distinct command names; automation commands auto-route by platform (web/android/ios).

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: All-in-one QA toolkit; commands namespaced /qa:<name>. Automation (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android, auto-routes by platform): exploratory/plan-tests/find-elements/cook/run/fix/analyze/count-cases/review/push-code/merge-request. Manual QA (distinct names): analyze-spec/plan-gen-testcases/gen-testcases/count-testcases/log-bug/update-board. Optional Lark/Slack/Teams/Telegram notify + Cloudflare R2 / S3 report upload.
